name: The Wastelands
summary: The dying world between settlement and city — ruins, dust, and the wreckage of the old world Molly first sees with horror and awe.

rooms.name: Collapsed Ruins
rooms.lighting: Stark overcast daylight, weak sun behind dust haze.
rooms.sounds: Wind keening through broken structures, settling debris.
rooms.ambient: Desolate, vast, awe and dread — the scale of what was lost.
rooms.furniture: Toppled concrete slabs, rebar tangles, a half-buried car, encroaching dust drifts.
rooms.map: Open field of rubble; a leaning tower fragment to the north, a road trace running east-west.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A vast field of collapsed post-apocalyptic ruins: toppled concrete slabs and tangled rebar, a half-buried rusted car, dust drifts, a leaning tower fragment on the horizon under stark overcast haze.

rooms.name: Highway Graveyard
rooms.lighting: Low golden hour raking across rusted metal, long shadows.
rooms.sounds: Wind through hollow chassis, creak of metal, far-off grit.
rooms.ambient: Eerie, frozen-in-time — a river of dead machines.
rooms.furniture: Endless rusted vehicles nose-to-tail, a collapsed overpass, sun-bleached signage.
rooms.map: A choked highway curving toward the horizon; collapsed overpass mid-distance, vehicles jammed the full width.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A post-apocalyptic highway graveyard: a river of rusted abandoned vehicles nose-to-tail stretching to the horizon, a collapsed overpass, sun-bleached signage, low golden-hour light raking across the metal.

rooms.name: The Ridge Overlook
rooms.lighting: Cold blue dusk, the distant city glowing on the horizon.
rooms.sounds: High wind, the hush of a vast empty distance.
rooms.ambient: Pivotal, ominous — first sight of the Accord City ahead.
rooms.furniture: Bare rock outcrop, a wind-stunted dead tree, a cairn of stacked stones.
rooms.map: A high ridge edge looking out; the gleaming city far on the horizon, the wasteland sprawling below.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A high rocky ridge overlooking a post-apocalyptic wasteland at cold blue dusk: a bare outcrop, a wind-stunted dead tree, and far on the horizon a faint gleaming geometric city glowing cool blue-white.
